SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DIANA MARIA PERDOMO URIAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URIAS, DIANA MARIA PERDOMO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT URIAS, DIANA MARIA PERDOMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
